title: [A Frozen Battlefield, Trench]
description: The thudding and pounding above have been replaced by thin scratching sounds.  An occasional rattle fills the air, a familiar yet unnerving noise, perhaps steel on bone.  Footing is treacherous among the frozen puddles that cover the trench basin and threaten to turn an ankle or cause a nasty spill.

wayto.3248:
;e empty_hands
move 'climb south wall'
waitrt?
fill_hands
wayto.3257:
;e empty_hands
move 'climb north wall'
waitrt?
fill_hands
wayto.3261: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'southeast'
wayto.3263: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'west'
